homepage.title: Reliable and Industrial Sensor Solutions | DIS Sensors
homepage.description: Discover reliable sensor solutions for tilt, acceleration, and rotation. DIS Sensors delivers innovation, precision, and support worldwide.

Reliable and Industrial Sensor Solutions | DIS Sensors
Development & Production
Reliable and innovative sensor solutions
About DIS
Smart, tailored sensor solutions
DIS Sensors is a Dutch manufacturer of sensors. All products are developed and produced entirely in-house, with a strong focus on quality and reliability. Together with our distributors and customers, we actively think along to find the best solution for your application. Not a standard product, but a solution that works in real-world conditions.
Curious about the possibilities?
Get in touch today to discuss your application.
Find your local distributor
Distributors
At DIS Sensors we collaborate with a global network of trusted distributors to provide our sensor solutions worldwide. Each distributor is carefully selected to ensure they meet our high standards for service and technical support. Explore our network and find a local partner near you.
We work together with:
Choose a product category:
Discover
all products
Inclinometer

Accelerometer sensor

Cables and accessories
Customized Solutions
You can find innovative DIS Sensor solutions in a range of applications
DIS Sensors is proud to serve a wide range of industries with our advanced sensor solutions, all designed to meet the specific demands of a variety of applications. From enhancing the precision of industrial automation to supporting the needs of smart agriculture, our sensors deliver reliable performance in a range of sectors. Whatever your industry, DIS Sensors offers the technology you need to stand out in your field. Explore our application areas to learn how our sensors can improve your operations and drive innovation.
Handling and Lifting equiment
DIS Sensors provides solutions for handling and lifting equipment by offering highly accurate inclinometers that ensure safe operation through precise tilt monitoring.
These inclinometers:
Help maintain stability and prevent accidents.
Enhance safety and performance in demanding environments.
Offer accuracy up to 0.05°.
Marine and Water management
DIS Sensors plays an important role in marine and water management by providing accurate sensors that monitor the tilt and level of marine and/or water structures, making sure they operate safely. The sensors:
Monitor floodgate tilt and level.
Contribute to effective water management.
Help prevent malfunctions and improve reliability.
Production Machinery
DIS Sensors delivers solutions that enhance the safety, precision, and reliability of your production machinery. Our highly accurate sensors are designed to perform in the most demanding environments, ensuring your operations run smoothly and safely. Our sensors:
Monitor tilt and leveling.
Ensure smooth, safe, and precise operation.
Agricultural Vehicles

about.text:
About DIS Sensors Industrial Sensor Manufacturer | DIS Sensors
About DIS
Since 1987, we have been dedicated to designing and manufacturing advanced sensor solutions that meet the highest standards of accuracy and stability. So we can ensure precise and consistent measurements even in the harshest environments.
Read more
We work together with:
Discover DIS
From the Netherlands we
offer a wide range of
high quality
sensors for measuring inclination and acceleration as well as rotary
sensors
. We work with a
worldwide
network of trusted distributors, so we can offer
local support
at competitive prices. DIS Sensors has an excellent reputation in the field of customized solutions and we would be proud to be your
manufacturing
partner.
DIS Sensors specializes in the following sensor types:
Inclination sensors
Acceleration sensors
Tilt switches
Rotary encoders
ISO 9001:2025 Certification
With our in-house production, we ensure streamlined processes, reliable delivery and strict quality standards. That is why we are certified in accordance with ISO 9001:2015, the international standard for quality management. The audit and certification are carried out periodically by
Bureau Veritas
Download ISO 9001:2015 Certificate (pdf)
Innovative technology
Customizable
High-quality & precision
Global reach, Local support
We are experts in these fields
We bring reliable solutions to our customers in several sectors. Thanks to our knowledge and experience we’ve become specialized in these fields:
Handling and Lifting equiment
When it comes to handling and lifting,
for example in the logistics or utility sectors,
control over the machinery is crucial. By monitoring angles and detecting unsafe conditions, our sensors play a vital role in safety and
efficiency in your automation process.
Marine and Water management
Our
sensors are essential
in maintaining
the
safety, efficiency, and environmental protection of marine and water management
systems.
By monitoring inclination they minimize risks and provide smooth and reliable operation, ensuring optimal performance, especially during dynamic-static transitions.
Production Machinery
It doesn’t matter if you use large industrial machines or precision instruments, sensors in production machinery are always needed! Our
reliable sensor solutions help
your machinery in
alignment, orientation
and safety monitoring.
Thanks to our in-house manufacturing, we can design and produce sensors that are customized to meet your specific needs.
Agricultural Vehicles
Sensors in agricultural vehicles are everywhere. Our
robust sensors can withstand the harshest environments. They
can be used to control and monitor the positioning of equipment attached to the vehicle, such as seeders, plows, or sprayers.
Medical Appliances
Our sensors meet the perfect requirements to measure the angular position of, for example, MRI, CT-scanners or mobile operation chairs. This ensures safety for the staff and patient!
Sustainable Energy
Sensors play an important role in optimizing sustainable energy. For example, acceleration sensors are useful for monitoring vibrations in wind turbines. While inclinometers are used to ensure the right alignment for solar panels.
Construction Machinery
Our sensors give accurate position feedback, ensure stability and enhance safety in tough environments. For example on cranes, excavators, bulldozers, dumpers and loaders.
Rotero Holding
DIS Sensors is a production company which is part of Rotero Holding. The holding consists of 5 independent operating companies, each specialized in a different range of products and with their own customers. Through mutual cooperation we can call in experts of all areas, leading to better results for our clients.
We have experts in:
Smart sensor solutions
Motion control & robotica
Industrial design, development & production
What our distributors say
With DIS’s innovative strength, we provide our customers with reliable and future-oriented sensor technology.
Dimitry van der La
